title.es: v1.30.10 — Fix en OpenCode model picker

body_html.es: Patch bump del TUI: fix(tui): improve OpenCode model picker. Te mejora la selección de modelos en la terminal cuando usás el provider OpenCode.
body_html.en: TUI patch bump: fix(tui): improve OpenCode model picker. Smoother model selection in the terminal when using the OpenCode provider.
body_html.fr: Patch TUI : fix(tui): improve OpenCode model picker. Sélection de modèles plus fluide dans le terminal avec le provider OpenCode.

title.es: v1.30.9 — Multi model picker accesible + e2e Antigravity
title.en: v1.30.9 — Multi model picker reachable + Antigravity e2e
title.fr: v1.30.9 — Multi model picker accessible + e2e Antigravity

body_html.es: Doble patch: fix(tui): keep OpenCode multi model picker reachable y fix(e2e): expect Antigravity CLI skills path. Ojo si tenías el picker escondido detrás de algún layout — ahora queda accesible siempre.
body_html.en: Two patches: fix(tui): keep OpenCode multi model picker reachable and fix(e2e): expect Antigravity CLI skills path. If the picker was getting hidden by layout, this keeps it reachable.
body_html.fr: Deux correctifs : fix(tui): keep OpenCode multi model picker reachable et fix(e2e): expect Antigravity CLI skills path. Le picker reste accessible même quand la mise en page le masquait.
